generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, you know how important it is to stay vigilant. Recent events show that our current security measures are not keeping up with evolving threats. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting them. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident. With stronger tools, they could have prevented it entirely. Our safety shouldn't wait for the next crisis. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFreedoms
